text.title: Where project-spec/ lives
text.summary: The project-spec/ location is a per-project decision declared in constitution.md. The methodology lists defaults but never picks for you.

rule.statement: constitution.md MUST contain a section "Project-spec location" naming the absolute or repo-relative path to project-spec/.
rule.rationale: Agents and humans need one place to look. Without an explicit declaration the path becomes folklore and onboarding breaks.
Co-locates the spec with the lifecycle docs (features/, crs/, bugs/). One mental model, one tree.

rule.statement: For multi-repo projects (e.g. backend + frontend + e2e), place project-spec/ in a product-level directory external to any single repo. Default: `/.product/spec/`.
rule.rationale: The spec describes the whole product, not one repo. Lodging it inside one repo makes the others second-class and creates merge friction.

example.code: # In each repo's constitution.md ## Project-spec location `../.product/spec/` (multi-repo: shared with backend, frontend, e2e).

antipattern.description: project-spec/ inside `.git/`-untracked .aidocs/ when the project is shared with multiple people.
antipattern.reason: The spec disappears for everyone else. .aidocs/ is appropriate ONLY when committed to the repo.
